## Test plan

## Docs

- [ ] `README.md` updated if user-facing CLI/HTTP contract changed

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat`, `fix`, `perf`, `revert`, `docs`, `refactor`, `build`, `ci`, `chore`, `test`)
